name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly changes the methodology for data preprocessing (new target definition, new feature engineering), mechanical property modeling (switching from classification to GPR regression with uncertainty quantification), and the overall analysis framework (introducing Applicability Domain and Active Learning). Because the core modeling approach and data processing logic have fundamentally shifted, no steps from the old plan can be safely reused.
